Mattermost MCP API

chat.diegonmarcos.com — team messaging, channels, reactions

MCP Tools

8 tools via cloud-infra MCP server

MCPmm_read

Read messages from a Mattermost channel. Returns recent posts with author, timestamp, and content.

string — Channel name or ID
number — Max messages to return (default: 30)
MCPmm_post

Post a new message to a Mattermost channel.

string — Channel name or ID
string — Message text (Markdown supported)
MCPmm_reply

Reply to an existing message in a thread.

string — ID of the root post to reply to
string — Reply text
MCPmm_react

Add an emoji reaction to a post.

string — Post to react to
string — Emoji name (e.g. thumbsup, heart)
MCPmm_channels

List channels the bot user has access to. Returns channel name, type (public/private/DM), and member count.

string — Team name (optional, defaults to first team)
MCPmm_add_to_channel

Add a user to a channel.

string — Channel name or ID
string — User ID to add
MCPmm_create_group_dm

Create a group direct message channel with multiple users.

string[] — Array of user IDs to include
MCPmm_user_search

Search for users by username, email, or display name.

string — Search term

REST API
